indicators.name: couch
indicators.rationale: The presence of a couch obstructs the open floor space required for yoga.

indicators.name: pillows
indicators.rationale: The pillows on the couch further obstruct the open floor space.

indicators.name: floor-wood
indicators.rationale: Wooden flooring is not suitable for yoga mats due to its slipperiness and lack of cushioning.

indicators.name: couch in corner
indicators.rationale: The couch is placed in a corner, leaving no open floor space for yoga.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for yoga or stretching due to the presence of a couch and pillows, which obstruct the open floor space required for these activities. The wooden flooring is also not suitable for yoga mats. The score of 1 reflects the complete lack of open floor space and the presence of obstacles that prevent any yoga or stretching activities.
